name: Non-Slip Rollup Desk Mat Beige/Tan - Brightroom™
description:
Enhance the aesthetics and functionality of your workstation with this Rollup Desk Mat from Brightroom™. Designed in a rectangular shape with rounded corners, this desk mat adds a touch of sophistication. The non-slip back provides better traction to keep objects in place, and the gray tone allows it to pair with various decor styles.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
